form.formComment: Last start 11th (10m Fr4) over 2503m at Gloucester Park, beaten 45 m by Medieval Man (3:04.80) in G3 NR 70 or better on April 3 at $26. At his previous start good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 2100m at Bunbury, beaten 18 m by Lazi Dais (2:31.40) in 4yo+ NR 70 to 80 on March 28 at $11. Genuine contender.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 9th (Fr2) over 2185m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 35 m by Soho Shakedown (2:36.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 80 on April 6 at $9.
